description_long: This object is a rugged, box-shaped air conditioner unit with a weathered, industrial appearance, featuring a metallic gray exterior marred by scratches and rust stains. The front face displays a large circular grille with a grid pattern, partially bordered in red, and two indicator lights—one green and one red—set into a control panel on the right. The sides are flat and reinforced, with the left side showing horizontal vent slats and the right side featuring rectangular access panels. The bottom is supported by two sturdy legs, elevating the unit above the ground. The back is open, revealing the internal compartment and the rear of the grille, with additional signs of wear and rust. The overall design suggests durability for outdoor urban environments, such as alleys, building exteriors, or garages.
description: A rugged, boxy air conditioner with a large circular grille, indicator lights, and a weathered metallic finish, supported by two legs and showing signs of rust and wear.
description_view_0: The left side view shows horizontal vent slats and a weathered, scratched surface.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the large circular grille, rust stains, and two colored indicator lights on the control panel.
description_view_2: The right side view displays rectangular access panels and a similarly worn metallic surface.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals an open compartment, the back of the grille, and additional rust and wear inside the unit.
attribute_grille_pattern: The grille is circular with a square grid mesh pattern, evenly spaced, and bordered by a thin red ring.
attribute_control_panel_location: Front right side, adjacent to the grille.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Single set of horizontal slats on the left side, rectangular in shape, serving as the exhaust vent.
